page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Individual-patient prediction of meningioma malignancy and survival using the Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results database.

Meningioma.app is the companion app to our paper, "Individual-patient prediction of meningioma malignancy and survival using the Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results database".
